lessons.title: My Mother and Father
lessons.topic: Core family and sounds of U and V

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who loves to tell bedtime stories?
Who usually waters the plants?
questions.hint: She takes care of the garden.

questions.question_text: Who rides the bicycle to school?
questions.hint: He likes to cycle every morning.

steps.title: Family Day
steps.text: This is my mother. She has a yellow umbrella. My father drives a big van. At home, we laugh together.

questions.question: What color is the mother's umbrella?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have a' to show something you own.

steps.audio_text: Hi there! Look at my big van. My father and I have a blue umbrella.

questions.question_text: This is my ___. (Grammar question)
Which word means 'a person who is your dad'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: An umbrella is a vehicle.
What do you use when it's raining?
Can you sit in a van?

lessons.title: Brother and Sister
lessons.topic: Siblings and sounds of W and X

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who is waving in the video?
questions.hint: Look for a boy moving his hand from side to side.

questions.question_text: What is the first letter in the word 'wave'?
questions.hint: It's like the first sound in 'water'.

questions.question_text: Which family member is cooking in the video?
questions.hint: Look for the person in the kitchen.

steps.title: Our Family Day
steps.text: This is my brother. My brother has a big box. My sister is here. She is looking at her watch. We are playing together!

questions.question: Who is looking at a watch?

steps.explanation: Use this to show your family.

steps.audio_text: This is my sister. She has a big red box and loves to put her watch inside it. My brother thinks it's special too.

questions.question: Who has the big red box?
Does the brother like the watch?

questions.question_text: I have a ___. (Grammar question)
What sound does 'X' make in 'box'? (Reading comprehension question)
Which word means 'a male sibling'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A 'sister' is a type of watch.

lessons.title: Grandpa and Baby
lessons.topic: Extended family and sounds of Y and Z

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What animal sound makes Baby laugh? 🐱
questions.hint: It's a sound a cat makes.

questions.question_text: What does Grandpa do to hear better? 👂
What does Grandma like to bake? 🍪

steps.title: Family Fun Day
steps.text: This is my grandpa. He plays with a yo-yo. My grandma gives me a zebra toy. The baby laughs. We all have fun!

steps.explanation: Use this to talk about family.

steps.audio_text: My grandpa has a fun yo-yo. My grandma reads to me about a zebra. We smile a lot!

questions.question: What animal does grandma read about?

questions.question_text: My ___ is happy. (Fill in the blank with a family member)
What toy does grandpa like? (Vocabulary question)
The zebra has black and white stripes. (True or False)
Finish the sentence: My family is ___ wonderful! (Grammar pattern)
What sound does the letter Z make at the end? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal in the video likes to hop and has a pouch?
questions.hint: This animal carries its babies in a pouch.

questions.question_text: What color is the parrot that likes to talk?
questions.hint: This parrot is the color of grass.

questions.question_text: Which animal is the largest and lives in the ocean?
questions.hint: This animal is the biggest in the ocean and does not have sharp teeth.

steps.title: Lily's Family Day
steps.text: Hello! I am Lily. This is my mother and father. I have a big brother. My grandma is here. We have a blue car. I am excited!

steps.audio_text: This is my kitchen. I have a big red table and a fluffy white dog. My sister is eating an apple.

steps.expected_text: this is my mother and this is my father

questions.question_text: My ____ is playing with a toy. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'cat'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'This is my book.' is a correct sentence.
What color is the apple on the table?
'My mother is cooking.' What is she doing?
